notableEvents.label: Konnor Griffin GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Konnor Griffin grounds into a double play, second baseman Edouard Julien to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Spencer Horwitz out at 2nd. Konnor Griffin out at 1st.
